name: ultimate frolf chaos!
short_description: Just an average multiplayer golfing game for up to eight players... with FROGS?
detailed_description:
ultimate frolf chaos is a simple multiplayer golfing game to play with friends, but with a twist. There are no balls, just frogs.

  • FROGS

Frogs jump after they land, and that can lead to many unexpected results on every course. You may find that typical golf hazards might be easier to traverse as well...

  • SPECIAL COURSES

Frolf on five unique courses, from an average day on the links to venturing through outer space and avoiding lava flows. These courses provide unique obstacles and items to help the race for the highest score!

  • A SANDBOX OF ITEMS

After each round, every player selects from different items that range from smirking trees to happy dinosaurs. These items persist between rounds so plan carefully to trap your friends and give yourself the best chance for victory!
